A

ACE - Enum constant in enum class Rank
 
addCard(Card) - Method in class Hand
Adds a card to a hand

C

Card - Class in Unnamed Package
Formats Card objects with suits and ranks Uses the suits and ranks from a standard deck of 52 cards and stores them in objects
Card(Rank, Suit) - Constructor for class Card
Constructs a card object
CLUBS - Enum constant in enum class Suit
 

D

deal(Hand, int) - Method in class Deck
Deals x cards from the given deck to a specified hand
Deck - Class in Unnamed Package
Creates "decks" of 52 cards with the standard 13 ranks and 4 suits Allows you to create new decks that store cards to be manipulated Stores card objects
Deck(String) - Constructor for class Deck
Constructs a deck object
DIAMONDS - Enum constant in enum class Suit

EIGHT - Enum constant in enum class Rank
 
equals(Object) - Method in class Card
equals() override in order to format method to compare a cards rank and suit

FIVE - Enum constant in enum class Rank

G

getCards() - Method in class Deck
Gives an unmodifiable list of cards to caller
getCards() - Method in class Hand
Gives an unmodifiable list of cards to caller
getName() - Method in class Deck
Gets name of given deck
getName() - Method in class Hand
Gets name of given hand
getRank() - Method in class Card
Allows caller to get the rank of given card
getSuit() - Method in class Card
Allows caller to get the suit of given card

H

Hand - Class in Unnamed Package
Creates "Hands" which store Card objects Allows you to create Hand objects to add and remove cards from
Hand(String) - Constructor for class Hand
Constructs a Hand object
hashCode() - Method in class Card

Rank - Enum Class in Unnamed Package

removeCard(Card) - Method in class Hand

SEVEN - Enum constant in enum class Rank
 
shuffle() - Method in class Deck

size() - Method in class Deck
Gets size of given deck
size() - Method in class Hand
Gets size of given hand
SPADES - Enum constant in enum class Suit
 
Suit - Enum Class in Unnamed Package
Enum list of all 4 suits in a standard 52 card deck
